prompt:
A 300 W inverter mounted securely within a compact power bay beside a small battery pack, with thick fused leads and ring terminals fastened to a distribution block. A torque marker dab and cable strain relief are visible, emphasizing careful installation and safety; no brand labels or readable markings.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a clean near-future portable power aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, neat cable routing, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the mounted inverter and fused wiring as the clear focal point.
